scripts.build: npm run build:contracts && npm run build:api && npm run build:extension
scripts.test:api: npm run build:contracts && npm --workspace apps/api run test
scripts.benchmark:providers: npm run build:contracts && npm --workspace apps/api run benchmark:providers --
scripts.benchmark:business-tech: npm run build:contracts && npm --workspace apps/api run benchmark:business-tech --
scripts.benchmark:live: npm run build:contracts && npm --workspace apps/api run benchmark:live --
scripts.benchmark:holdout: npm run build:contracts && npm --workspace apps/api run benchmark:holdout --
scripts.eval:gold: npm run build:contracts && npm --workspace apps/api run eval:gold --
scripts.test:prompts: npm run build:contracts && npm --workspace apps/api run prompt:regression --
